name: Christmas Advent Calendar 2025
short_description: The Nicokick Christmas Advent Calendar 2025 is here. With a value of over $100, this limited edition sells out fast. Be sure to get yours while quantities last.
description:
About the Product - Nicokick Christmas Advent Calendar 2025

This limited-edition Christmas Advent Calendar contains 25 cans from 10 different brands, including ZYN, zone, Rogue, Sesh, Fre, and Clew, in a wide range of flavors and strengths (3–9 mg).

This year’s Nicokick Christmas Advent Calendar includes 25 full-size cans of tobacco leaf-free nicotine pouches packed in reusable, satin-style bags. The lineup blends classic and newly released products to keep every day in December interesting. Not only this, but each calendar contains ZYN limited edition cans and 1 brand not yet available on Nicokick— so you’ll be the first to try one of our newest additions!

What the calendar contains

  • 25 full-size cans of nicotine pouches
  • Brands included: ZYN, zone, Rogue, Sesh, Fre, Clew and more!
  • Flavors include a broad mix of refreshing mint and wintergreen, fruity and berry varieties, citrus blends, spiced profiles, and other unique seasonal selections.
  • Strengths: Find strengths ranging from 3mg-9mg
  • Two cans included on Christmas Eve
  • Reusable satin bags

Don’t wait to order your Christmas Advent Calendar! Previous editions sold out quickly in other markets, lasting only a few days!

Your price: $69.99 plus applicable taxes.
Total retail value: Over $100.
Edition: Limited - while supplies last.
Purchase Limit: 2 calendars per order.

FAQ

What is a Christmas Advent Calendar?

Traditionally, an Advent Calendar is a countdown to Christmas, where each day in December reveals a small surprise, often chocolate or another treat.

How is the Nicokick Advent Calendar different?

Ours follows the same idea — 24 days of surprises — but instead of chocolate, each day reveals a full-size can of nicotine pouches from a variety of brands and flavors. It’s a seasonal, limited-edition way to explore new products while counting down to the holidays.

How much does it cost?

The Christmas Advent Calendar will cost $69.99 plus applicable taxes.

How many products are included?

Each Christmas Advent Calendar includes 25 full-size cans of nicotine pouches.

Which brands are included?

Nicokick’s Christmas Advent Calendar will feature nicotine pouches from 10 different brands including ZYN, zone, Rogue, Sesh, Fre, Clew, and more.

Is the Christmas Advent Calendar Limited Edition?

Yes, only limited quantities are available. Previous editions have sold out every year in other markets since 2022, lasting only a few days.

Can the packaging be reused?

Yes. The satin-style bags can be refilled and reused to create your own Advent Calendar next year. The sturdy presentation box is also designed to be kept — perfect for storing pouches, accessories, or anything else you like once the holidays are over.

How long does shipping take?

Shipping will begin on November 12, and orders will be shipped within 0-3 business days after that. Delivery options and timeframes are shown at checkout.
